reports.name: Healthcare Provider Report
reports.description: Active and settled provider loans by specialty and state.
reports.sql: SELECT PROVIDER_ID, PROVIDER_NM, SPECIALTY_CD, STATE_CD, LOAN_AMT, STATUS_CD, APPROVAL_DT FROM SCHEMA.DIM_PROVIDER WHERE 1=1 AND SPECIALTY_CD IN :specialty AND STATUS_CD IN :status

reports.name: Loan Arrears Summary
reports.description: Accounts with outstanding overdue amounts by risk band.
reports.sql: SELECT ACCOUNT_ID, CLIENT_NM, DAYS_OVERDUE, AMOUNT_OWING, PRODUCT_CD, RISK_BAND FROM SCHEMA.FACT_ARREARS WHERE RISK_BAND IN :risk_band AND DAYS_OVERDUE >= :days_overdue

reports.name: Monthly Settlements
reports.description: Settlement volume and value trends by month.
reports.sql: SELECT MONTH_NM, SETTLEMENT_CNT, TOTAL_VALUE, AVG_LOAN_SIZE, YOY_CHANGE FROM SCHEMA.FACT_SETTLEMENTS ORDER BY MONTH_NM
